data.body: FINAL STATE: LANDED via Gerrit -> change 367 (canary --force-close fix, MERGED) + change 368 (bug5 flaky-format round-trip fix, MERGED). CLOSED: luxe-adder-faith(P1 false alert, force), cc7f/slum-shoal-gully(verifier PASS+signed, already-fixed by 44bafdb9e), jira-reb-714(force, already-fixed by 440095133). FILED: 0dc5 canary(done), 9b3a flaky-format(done), 67ee completion-verifier-crash(open, new). OPEN/HONEST: edf7 vocal-dip-robin bug4 root cause UNCONFIRMED (gc hypothesis REFUTED experimentally: 154<<6700 objects; 0/275 local repros incl 200 saturated; create-path swallows git stderr at event_append.py:139 — recommend surfacing it to diagnose; NO speculative fix shipped). f193 store-corruption PARTIAL: RC1/RC2a fixed by 5a7548a0e, residual RC2b+remediation deferred to epic ace2 — needs user decision (close-as-superseded vs pursue ace2). AWS check BLOCKED on 'aws login --profile frontier'. Flaky-detection sweep INCOMPLETE (subagent hit watchdog).
